title: Poems & Hymns to Arunachala
meta_description: A collection of sacred poems and hymns dedicated to Arunachala, including works by Ramana Maharshi, Arunagirinathar, and other saints and sages.
body_html:
Poems & Hymns

A treasury of sacred poetry and devotional hymns dedicated to Arunachala, composed by saints, sages, and devotees across the centuries. Each poem is a doorway into the living presence of the Hill.

Index of Poems & Hymns

  • Aditya Hridayam
  • Annamalai Venba
  • Arunachala Akshara Mana Malai
  • Arunachala Navamanimalai
  • Arunachala Pancharatna
  • Arunachala Patikam
  • Arunachala Stuti — Sixth Hymn to Arunachala
  • Arunachala Suprabatham
  • Arunagiri Antadi
  • Arunagiri Malai
  • Hail to Thee! O' Arunachala
  • Hymns to Arunachala
  • Shree Shiva Astottara Shatanaamaavali
  • Significance of Arunachala
  • Sri Arunachala Ashtakam
  • Thiruvammaanai
  • Thiruvempaavai
notes: The /poems source page is an index/hub with only a hero image and links to 17 individual poem sub-pages. No prose body was present. Body HTML preserves the full link list. Individual poem sub-pages were not in the task scope.
